query: SELECT s.id, s.name, c.name as categoryName, s.hasSizeVariants, s.hasBobaOption FROM subcategories s JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id WHERE c.name LIKE '%Main%' OR c.name LIKE '%Food%' OR c.slug LIKE '%asian%' OR s.name LIKE '%Chick%' OR s.name LIKE '%Gozilla%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT s.id, s.name, c.name as categoryName, s.hasSizeVariants, s.hasBobaOption FROM subcategories s JOIN categories c ON s.categoryId = c.id WHERE c.name LIKE '%Main%' OR c.name LIKE '%Food%' OR c.slug LIKE '%asian%' OR s.name LIKE '%Chick%' OR s.name LIKE '%Gozilla%';
